Politics.headline: Senate passes bill aimed at making US housing more accessible and affordable
Politics.detail: The Senate passed a broad bill to make U.S. housing more accessible and affordable, a rare bipartisan effort in Congress to address a growing national problem.

Politics.headline: Carney announces $35B for defence, infrastructure in Canada's North
Politics.detail: The Liberal government has unveiled a detailed, multibillion-dollar proposal to modernize and expand Canada's military footprint in the country's Far North.

Politics.headline: Starmer may face more resignations after release of Mandelson WhatsApp messages, say sources
Politics.detail: Sources indicate that Keir Starmer may face additional resignations following the release of WhatsApp messages involving Mandelson.

Politics.headline: Pentagon tells lawmakers Iran war costs top $11.3bn – but true price unknown
Politics.detail: The Pentagon has informed lawmakers that the war with Iran has cost over $11.3 billion, but the actual total expense remains unknown.

Politics.headline: White House outraged over new CBS News hire
Politics.detail: The White House has expressed outrage over CBS News's latest hiring decision.

Finance & Economy.headline: Chinese banks boost loans to tech sector as Beijing ramps up AI push
Finance & Economy.detail: Chinese lenders plan to steer more money toward technology and innovation-oriented firms, bankers say, as Beijing promotes AI development.

Finance & Economy.headline: Wall St ends sharply lower as intensifying Iran war, soaring crude prompt selloff
Finance & Economy.detail: U.S. stocks fell on Thursday, as Iranian strikes on two oil refineries exacerbated concerns.

Finance & Economy.headline: Brazil's top court bars Trump adviser from visiting Bolsonaro in prison
Finance & Economy.detail: Brazil's Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes denied a request from imprisoned former President Bolsonaro’s advisor to visit him in prison.

Finance & Economy.headline: US Senate fails to end standoff over funding Homeland Security, airport screening
Finance & Economy.detail: Senators from both parties failed on Thursday in competing efforts to fund Homeland Security and airport screening.

Finance & Economy.headline: UK regulator examines IT glitch that enabled bank customers to see others' accounts on app
Finance & Economy.detail: The UK regulator is investigating an IT glitch that allowed bank customers to view other customers' accounts on the mobile app.

Technology.headline: Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Pro review: The smarter buy for professionals on a budget
Technology.detail: ZDNET reviews the Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Pro, highlighting it as a smart choice for professionals seeking a balance of features and affordability.

Technology.headline: How to enter Safe Mode on your Android phone - and why it's critical to do so
Technology.detail: ZDNET provides a guide on how to boot an Android phone into Safe Mode and explains the importance of this mode for troubleshooting issues.

Technology.headline: How to disable HDMI-CEC on your TV - and why it's critical to do so
Technology.detail: ZDNET explains what HDMI-CEC is, how to disable it on your TV, and why disabling it can be important for security and privacy reasons.

Technology.headline: AI search robot uses 3D maps and internet knowledge to find lost items
Technology.detail: A new AI-powered search robot utilizes 3D maps and internet knowledge to locate lost items, potentially revolutionizing search and rescue operations.

Technology.headline: Palm-sized superconducting magnet achieves 42 tesla, rivaling the world's biggest
Technology.detail: Researchers have developed a palm-sized superconducting magnet that can achieve a magnetic field strength of 42 tesla, comparable to the largest magnets in the world, opening new possibilities for research and technology.

Health.headline: VTE Trial: As DOACs Face Off, Apixaban Confirmed Safer
Health.detail: Apixaban halved the risk for bleeding compared with rivaroxaban in the treatment of acute venous thromboembolism in the randomized COBRRA trial.

Health.headline: More Parents Declining Vitamin K Shot for Newborns
Health.detail: An increasing number of parents are choosing to decline vitamin K shots for their newborns.

Health.headline: Facing Death as a Doctor: Knowledge vs Nature
Health.detail: A reflection on the experience of facing death as a physician, contrasting medical knowledge with the natural process of dying.

Health.headline: NHS Trust Deficits Force 'Difficult Choices' on Care
Health.detail: NHS trusts in England ran a significant deficit last year, leading to difficult choices that could negatively impact patient care.

Health.headline: Psilocybin 6 Times More Effective Than Nicotine Patch to Help Smokers Quit
Health.detail: Smokers who received psilocybin alongside CBT counseling may have a greater chance of quitting tobacco for the long term.

Sports.headline: 'Heavy knock': Broncos' blow for GF rematch with Storm as skipper set for scans on damaged ribs
Sports.detail: Broncos skipper Adam Reynolds sustained a rib injury during a match against the Eels and is unlikely to play in the Grand Final rematch against the Storm, pending scan results. Coach Michael Maguire expressed concern over Reynolds' condition after their 40-32 loss to Parramatta.

Sports.headline: 'Having a look': Maguire puts Broncos players on notice as big question hangs over defending premiers
Sports.detail: Following a 40-32 loss to Parramatta, Broncos coach Michael Maguire stated he would be evaluating each player in the squad. He emphasized the need for an 80-minute performance and refused to guarantee anyone's place in the team ahead of their match against Melbourne.

Sports.headline: 'It was incredible': The brutal one-man Burgess demolition that left Roosters legend stunned
Sports.detail: Roosters legend Jared Waerea-Hargreaves recalled Dylan Napa's dominant performance against Sam Burgess in a 2016 match between the Roosters and Rabbitohs. Waerea-Hargreaves, who was injured at the time, witnessed Napa's display from the stands and was amazed by Napa's performance.

Sports.headline: No. 21 Virginia Downs No. 18 Clemson
Sports.detail: The No. 21 Virginia women's tennis team defeated the No. 18 Clemson Tigers 4-2 in Clemson. Virginia secured the victory after Melodie Collard won her singles match in three sets.

Sports.headline: Top Aussie talent set to shine at the 2026 Wodonga International
Sports.detail: The 2026 Wodonga International, the first of two grass-court events on the Australian Pro Tour, will be held from March 15-22, showcasing Australian tennis talent. Pavle Markinov (NSW) is the top seed in the men's field, while Sarah Rokuesek (NSW) headlines the women's draw.

Entertainment.headline: Netflix announces sequel for record-breaking animated film 'KPop Demon Hunters'
Entertainment.detail: Netflix's record-breaking animated feature "KPop Demon Hunters" (2025) will get a sequel, with Maggie Kang and Chris Appelhans returning to direct. The film has also received Oscar nominations for Best Animated Feature and Best Original Song.

Entertainment.headline: Woman charged with attempted murder after shots fired at Rihanna's L.A. home
Entertainment.detail: A woman has been arrested and charged with attempted murder after allegedly firing a gun toward singer Rihanna's home in Los Angeles on Sunday afternoon, police say.

Entertainment.headline: Host of Celebrity Tipping Point NZ announced
Entertainment.detail: Daniel Faitaua has been revealed as the host of Celebrity Tipping Point New Zealand, a new local version of the popular quiz show set to air later this year on TVNZ 1 and TVNZ+. The show will feature Kiwi personalities playing for charity.

Entertainment.headline: Jack Osbourne names newborn baby girl Ozzy in honour of late father
Entertainment.detail: Jack Osbourne and his wife, Aree Gearhart, welcomed a baby girl and named her Ozzy, seven months after his father died at the age of 76.

Entertainment.headline: Remembering the 'Rasikan' child artist Hari Murali
Entertainment.detail: The Malayalam entertainment world is in shock following the untimely death of former child artist Hari Murali, aged 27, who was known for his roles in films like 'Rasikan' and popular TV serials. He was found deceased at his home and was reportedly battling depression.

Crime & Justice.headline: Assailant dead after vehicle ramming, gunfire at Michigan synagogue in US
Crime & Justice.detail: A person rammed a vehicle into a synagogue in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan and opened fire; the assailant is now dead.

Crime & Justice.headline: Virginia university assailant dead, three injured in shooting: Police
Crime & Justice.detail: A shooting at Old Dominion University in Norfolk, Virginia, left the assailant dead and three others injured, according to police reports.

Crime & Justice.headline: ROTC students at Old Dominion subdued and killed the shooter who killed 1 person, wounded 2
Crime & Justice.detail: At Old Dominion University, ROTC students subdued and killed a shooter who had killed one person and wounded two others.

Crime & Justice.headline: FBI: Attack at Michigan synagogue was a 'targeted act of violence against the Jewish community'
Crime & Justice.detail: The FBI is investigating the attack at a Michigan synagogue as a targeted act of violence against the Jewish community.

Crime & Justice.headline: Sparks' Rickea Jackson asks for protective order against ex-boyfriend, Falcons' player James Pearce Jr.
Crime & Justice.detail: WNBA player Rickea Jackson has requested a protective order against her former boyfriend, NFL player James Pearce Jr.

Education.headline: Sudan's Burhan Orders Education Committee Amid Teacher Wage Demands
Education.detail: Sudan's Sovereign Council Chairman Abdel Fattah al-Burhan has ordered the formation of a committee to support education, while the Teachers' Committee is demanding a sharp increase in the minimum wage to combat soaring living costs in light of the deteriorating living conditions teachers face since the war began in April 2023. The committee is also calling for adjusting fixed-value allowances to keep pace with inflation and for the full settlement of all outstanding financial arrears.

Education.headline: Manhattan proposal for NYC's first AI-focused public high school sparks pushback
Education.detail: A proposal for Next Generation Technology High School, which would be the first public school in New York City to focus its curriculum on AI and computer science, is facing opposition from families in Manhattan's District 2. The Education Department expects to release AI guidance in the coming weeks and will provide a 45-day window for community feedback once it's published.

Education.headline: News Headlines for School Assembly – 13 March 2026
Education.detail: The government is planning to expand higher education opportunities through new universities and institutes, and digital learning platforms are gaining popularity among students across India. Schools are encouraging skill-based learning under the National Education Policy, and online education resources are helping students prepare for competitive examinations.

Education.headline: UNC World View: One World, Many Arts
Education.detail: UNC World View invites educators to participate in One World, Many Arts, a professional learning experience that explores how artistic expression reflects culture, history, and identity around the globe on March 13, 2026. Participants will examine a wide range of international art forms and explore their cultural and historical contexts.

Education.headline: Internationalization of Higher Education: Practices and Challenges of 'Going Global'
Education.detail: Senior educators and administrators from universities in China, the United States, Europe, and Australia gathered at the Harvard Business Review Beijing Center for a forum on internationalizing higher education. Participants discussed strategies for advancing university internationalization in a complex geopolitical environment, emphasizing the need for strategic localization and financially viable models.

Lifestyle.headline: Americans are fed up with tipping culture as nearly 9 in 10 say it's completely 'out of control'
Lifestyle.detail: A recent study reveals that a significant majority of Americans feel that tipping culture has become excessive, leading to frustration among consumers.

Lifestyle.headline: 3 Arizona Irish pubs rank among the best in the U.S.
Lifestyle.detail: Three Irish pubs in Arizona have been recognized as among the best in the United States, offering authentic Irish experiences and hospitality.

Lifestyle.headline: Women reveal surprising effects of being bald: 'It's a luxury'
Lifestyle.detail: Women are sharing the unexpected benefits and freedoms they've discovered after choosing to shave their heads, challenging conventional beauty standards.

Lifestyle.headline: Can seed oils, refined grains, and processed foods really trigger heart attacks?
Lifestyle.detail: A diabetologist recommends removing five mistakes from your diet, in order to avoid sudden heart attacks, such as seed oils, refined grains, and processed foods.

Lifestyle.headline: Smaller portions are a big restaurant trend as customers watch their budgets and waistlines.
Lifestyle.detail: Restaurants are adapting to changing customer preferences by offering smaller portion sizes, catering to both budget-conscious diners and those focused on healthier eating habits.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Thai neutrality key as Mideast war escalates
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Anucha Charoenpo argues that Thailand's neutrality is crucial as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies, requiring careful navigation of international relations.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Arbitrary and opaque: On the Employees' Pension Scheme 2026
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The EPFO's recent changes to the Employees' Pension Scheme, replacing the EPS 1995 with EPS 2026, have sparked concerns due to a lack of transparency and limited consultation with stakeholders, potentially affecting crores of members and pensioners.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Analysis: Structural challenges could limit Danantara's economic impact
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Despite plans to invest US$26 billion, questions remain about Danantara's broader economic impact amid limited state-owned enterprise (SOE) reforms and uncertainty over the implementation of its investment plans.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Taiwan key to Indo-Pacific security
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Alan H. Yang and Sana Hashmi argue that as the U.S. grapples with strategic attention, Taiwan's management of its vulnerability is critical for regional stability, urging coordinated efforts to strengthen the regional order with Taiwan's inclusion.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Spain standing strong: Opposing US, bonding with Türkiye
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Pedro Sanchez confronts Donald Trump by refusing to support the Iran war independently of the U.S., balancing alliances with independence and strengthening ties with Türkiye.

Zimbabwe.headline: Chiwenga's wife affected by Zimbabwe army shake-up
Zimbabwe.detail: Colonel Miniyothabo Baloyi has been removed from her influential role in military intelligence, reportedly due to the ongoing army shake-up.

Zimbabwe.headline: Madhuku, Biti file urgent court bid after attacks over Mnangagwa term extension bill
Zimbabwe.detail: Lovemore Madhuku, president of the National Constitutional Assembly (NCA), and former finance minister Tendai Biti have jointly filed an urgent High Court application following attacks related to the proposed Mnangagwa term extension bill.

Zimbabwe.headline: Violence and Intimidation Against Opponents of Presidential Term Extension
Zimbabwe.detail: Authorities in Zimbabwe have reportedly intensified their crackdown against critics opposing the ruling party's effort to extend the presidential term.

Zimbabwe.headline: Mugabe's son drops bail request – what has happened to the family after losing power
Zimbabwe.detail: The youngest son of Zimbabwe's former President, Robert Mugabe, has dropped his bail request following his arrest in South Africa.

Zimbabwe.headline: Ex-MP takes constitutional bill to court, says term extension clauses are illegal
Zimbabwe.detail: A former Member of Parliament is challenging the clauses in the constitutional bill that would extend the term of the president and parliament, arguing that they are illegal.
